text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week has managed to find success in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer! Are you there?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
H-hi! Hehe, sorry for stopping by out of nowhere
like this.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh... Well... actually!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Do you wanna go on a trip to Hokkaido with me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's asking me to tag along on a
visit to her home.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Haha, sorry for asking you out of the blue earlier.
I don't know why, but I was really nervous about
it...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But anyway, thank you for coming!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to introduce you for the longest
time since I managed to do well in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna introduce you to my moms in
person—like, "Hey! This is my trainer!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And I wanna tell them that I've grown so much
because you've been by my side!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The train rocking along, Special Week smiles
bashfully as we think about the fun trip ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...But things don't quite go as planned.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Wait, whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been following Special Week, who insists that
she's a confident grown-up. However...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh, no! D-don't be silly! What did I say before?
I've totally grown up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So there's absolutely no way... I'd... get... lost. I'm
pretty sure we took the right train...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sooooo sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and I are whipped into a panic over
the possibility of missing our flight, when—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Someone's calling me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hellooooo? Spe? You just realized that you're
lost, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-Sei?! How'd you know?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I realized you mentioned the wrong train
name when you were reading out your travel
itinerary yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Oh, Spe. You're as hopeless as ever!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Where are you right now? We will find the
shortest route, so please stay calm and talk to us.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aww, Grass and El too... You guys!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: We... We made it!
choice_data_list: We've got everyone to thank for this.
We've got everyone to thank for this.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! Let's buy them mountains of
souvenirs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I also gotta add this to the list of things to tell my
mom.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That I've got lots of friends... who are also my
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And that I've gotten stronger because I race
against them with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniff... phew...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mmhmm. That smell takes me back. It's the smell
of home.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's head to my house and say hi to my mom...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And then I want you to come with me to visit my
other mom's grave. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You've believed in me and my dream and
supported me from the very beginning.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How do you see me now?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm proud of myself too!
